name: cbs-frete-calculator
description: Plataforma de cálculo de frete para transporte - Frontend + API Vercel

scripts.build: (cd frontend && npm install && npm run build) && (cd api && npm install && npm run build) && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); fs.cpSync('./frontend/dist', './public', {recursive:true});"
